svg.title: FreightcarchecK Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing data flow from data generator through models and utils layers to the three Streamlit UI tabs: Dashboard, Manifest Table, and Train Layout.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about data_generator.py in FreightcarchecK')
sendPrompt('What does validate.py check in FreightcarchecK?')
sendPrompt('What data classes are in models.py?')
sendPrompt('How does data_loader.py work in FreightcarchecK?')
sendPrompt('What does app.py do in FreightcarchecK?')
sendPrompt('How does filters.py work in FreightcarchecK?')
sendPrompt('What does the Dashboard tab show in FreightcarchecK?')
sendPrompt('What filters are in the Manifest Table tab?')
sendPrompt('How does the Train Layout tab visualize hazmat cars?')

svg.text: Python 3.10+ · Streamlit · Plotly · Pandas · NumPy · JSON
